## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm test --run` passes
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes
- [ ] `pnpm build` succeeds
- [ ] README updated (if user-facing change)
- [ ] New tests added for new functionality
- [ ] Tested locally with `node dist/cli.js init /tmp/test-project`
